1:
The personality of a native born in Ashwini Nakshatra is very attractive and influential. Their physical build is well-proportioned, the face is bright, and the eyes are particularly captivating. They have a special royal gait in their movements that sets them apart from others. Their presence influences any environment, and people cannot easily forget them. Their voice is clear and influential, and a special confidence is observed in their way of speaking.

They think thoroughly before making any decision and maintain a unique perspective on every subject. Their line of thought is different from others, and they give great importance to their own opinions. Once they reach a decision, it is extremely difficult to change it because they have complete faith in their own judgment. They can give very good advice to others and help in changing the decisions or behavior of others, but no one can change their decisions or behavior. Because of this nature, they might sometimes be known as stubborn, but in reality, they are extremely committed to their principles and ideals.

They do not have blind faith in God; they do not accept any religion or belief without personally testing it. Their mind is scientific—they do not believe without evidence. The body is healthy and memory is sharp. They have the ability to understand right and wrong easily. The eyes are attractive. Unless there is a special reason, they do not create any unrest in society. Their thoughts are difficult for others to understand because they do not express their emotions externally. No one can easily guess what is going on in their heart.

They always help those who were by their side during their bad times. Their sense of gratitude is very strong, and they never forget a favor. They easily find solutions to any situation and never lose their control. They are people of old-fashioned thinking; they have an interest in music, literature, etc. They may suffer from mental stress by thinking about some unnecessary issues. Due to frequent disagreements with their own people's thinking, distance may also arise from them. In this regard, if they change the way they express their thoughts, the relationship can improve.

They want to gain success in life through their own hard work, not through the favors of their father or friends. Their self-respect is very strong, and they do not want to stretch their hands before anyone. They do not like spending money, but they do not hesitate to spend in terms of respect or keeping promises. They earn good respect in society, and people value their opinions. They like cleanliness, beauty, and an organized environment. They want the environment around them to always remain tidy. Although generally healthy, a disease can cause trouble. They should stay away from alcohol and intoxicants, because once they go on the wrong path, it is difficult to return. A significant change comes in their life between the ages of 28 to 35, and after that, there is a gradual improvement in the workplace.
2:
The physical build of a native born in Bharani Nakshatra is beautiful and attractive. A special gravity and thoughtfulness are observed on their face. The eyes are sharp and piercing. Their body structure is strong and enduring. There is a special slowness in their movement, and their presence has a serious impact on the environment. Their voice is deep, and there is a special emphasis in their way of speaking.

Their behavior is not what others expect, which leads to the creation of opponents. They want to live life on their own terms and do not always give importance to social rules. They can do anything to maintain their prestige, which may also cause hardship in life. They cannot tolerate insulting situations and take them very seriously. Their self-respect is very strong, and if someone hurts their honor, they cannot easily forget it. They listen to others' opinions but do what they feel is right. Because of this nature, they are called independent-minded and free.

They want to gain knowledge of every subject, even those with which they have no connection. Their curiosity is very strong, and they always want to learn something new. Even if people do not give them much importance at first, after seeing their good behavior, they change their opinion later. They do not like to hurt anyone, and their heart is very soft. Although they keep their own opinion, they do nothing to satisfy others if they do not agree. They never abandon their principles in any situation. This dedication of theirs helps them in many areas of life, but sometimes it also creates problems.

They are ready to face any situation, but get annoyed if things happen against their will. Their mind is very sensitive, and small things can hurt them. They apologize without delay for their own mistakes, which is a very good quality of theirs. Observation power is very sharp; they can easily understand people's feelings. They struggle hard throughout life for success and always find alternatives. They are unfortunate in long-term friendships; even if there are close friends, the relationship breaks for some reason. In this regard, if they change their nature, friendship can become long-lasting.

Married life is happy; the spouse is skilled and well-behaved. Their spouse understands them and can adjust to their nature. They can get work done by colleagues in any way. They have to face unusual problems even in small areas, but do not get discouraged due to birth chart reasons. They should refrain from opposing others. They are healthy and attractive. Stability in the workplace comes after the age of 30, and improvement begins gradually.
3:
The physical structure of a native born in Krittika Nakshatra is sharp and well-structured. There is a special luster and radiance on their face. The eyes are fiery and sharp, which reflects their sharp intelligence. There is a special strength and endurance in their body's structure. There is a special self-confidence and firmness in their movement. Their presence brings a special warmth and power into the environment.

They always criticize their own behavior, thoughts, and actions and learn from their mistakes. Whatever they decide to do, no matter how difficult it is, they surely do it. Their resolve is very firm, and they never waver from their goal. There is an unusual loyalty towards others which may sometimes lead to trouble. Although they have the talent to improve their position in social activities, they cannot take full advantage of that power due to supportive policies. Their honesty and loyalty sometimes leave them behind in practical life.

They are very intelligent, although people usually have the opposite perception. Seeing their external behavior, people think they are less intelligent, but actually, their intelligence is very sharp. They move forward in life with small successes. First, they work for small successes, then move towards big successes, which require patience and hard work. Skilled in various subjects, even becoming skilled in fields they are not related to. Skilled in giving advice to others and preparing plans, but in their own case, they do not accept anyone's advice. Because of this nature, they are sometimes known as arrogant.

They can break all relationships and friendships that enter into their freedom. Their freedom is paramount to them, and they never sacrifice it at any cost. Wealth and fame only want to come through the right means. They never earn money through dishonest means. Religious person; likes activities that benefit others. Likes to do simple and clear work. Selfless nature gives them many followers. Married life is very successful, and their relationship with their life partner is very sweet. They have a natural talent for understanding the deep meaning of any subject. They are more successful away from home than in their motherland. Special improvement in the workplace happens after the age of 32.
4:
The physical structure of a native born in Rohini Nakshatra is very beautiful, attractive, and charming. Their face is as bright and soft as the moon. The eyes are large, charming, and emotional. There is a special grace and beauty in their body structure. There is a special sweetness and slowness in their movement. Their voice is sweet, and their way of talking is very attractive. Their presence makes any environment joyful.

They are prepared to do anything for people they love. Their love and loyalty are very deep, and they can sacrifice everything for their loved ones. If angered, they can create a mountain-like situation without thinking of the consequences. Their anger is very frightening, and it is difficult to control them at that time. But their anger does not last long and they calm down quickly. They have deep self-confidence that if they follow with dedication, they can be successful in any subject. Being honest, loyal, and just is an inherent part of their nature.

They can gain knowledge in various subjects and also adopt unconventional methods to reach their goals. Their thinking is creative, and they want to move forward on new paths. They spend with an open mind, not thinking about where the income comes from. Their control over expenses is low, due to which they may sometimes fall into financial trouble. They love to stay in public activities and have a special place in society. The eyes are very beautiful and the personality is attractive. They can get angry over small matters, and it is difficult to control them in an angry state.

They can easily catch mistakes made by others. Their observation power is very sharp, and they notice small details. Extremely self-respecting; they love to rule over others. They love to lead and are adept at getting work done under them. They receive more benefits from their mother, and their intimacy is more with the mother than the father. The mother is the most important person in their life. They do not like to listen to others' opinions, which can put them in trouble many times. Rahu's Dasha-Antardasha is troublesome, but Jupiter's Dasha brings improvement. They should work carefully in partnership business, because others may take advantage of their trusting nature. The best time in the workplace is between 30 to 45 years of life.
5:
The physical structure of a native born in Mrigashira Nakshatra is beautiful, soft, and attractive. A special restlessness and curiosity are observed on their face. The eyes are large, restless, and always looking for something new. Their body structure is flexible, and there is a special speed in their movement. Their voice is sweet, and their way of talking is very attractive. Their presence brings a special liveliness and enthusiasm into the environment.

Their personality is very attractive, and people are easily attracted to them. In childhood, various health-related problems may worry them, but with age, health improves. They view every aspect of life with a cautious eye, and their observation power is very sharp. For others, friendship with them can be a source of entertainment, because spending time with them is very enjoyable. Close friends or relatives may deceive them because they trust blindly. Because of their trusting nature, they may sometimes be cheated.

They do not believe in a luxurious life; they can also spend life with basic things. Unnecessary expenses will always happen in their life, for which they should pay attention to savings. Business will always keep changing in the beginning, but success is achieved once stability comes. They listen to others' opinions but accept their own decisions. They doubt and distrust in all matters, which saves them from wrong decisions. 25 to 30 years of age is unlucky in some aspects; positive changes come only after 32 years.

Anger rises quickly if there are no auspicious planets in the 4th and 10th houses. It is difficult to control their anger, but with time, they improve in this matter. Children may sometimes be antagonistic, but if given proper guidance, the relationship improves. Do not deviate from the path of morality, because their moral values are very strong. They should be careful in choosing new friends, because the influence of friends is more on them. Married life, even if successful, may have disagreements with the life partner. They are religious and have an interest in religious work. Both trade and jobs are auspicious; they should do businesses where less money is spent and intelligence is used.
6:
The physical structure of a native born in Ardra Nakshatra is sharp and quick. A special sharp intelligence is reflected on their face. The eyes are sharp, restless, and always alert. There is a special flexibility and strength in their body structure. A special speed and promptness are observed in their movement. Their voice is clear, and there is a special sharpness in their way of speaking. Their presence brings a special alertness into the environment.

They can earn from various sources, and their source of income is always variable. There may be changes in the beginning of business, but once stability comes, they achieve success. They do not get praised according to their merit and get less value for their skills, which can sometimes frustrate them. They cannot take true advantage of others and cannot praise others either, which leads to success coming late. Because of this nature of theirs, some obstacles are created in their career.

They always try to get things done as they say. If work is not done according to their mind, they get annoyed. Sometimes they get annoyed and angry, but their anger does not last long. Most of the time, they maintain friendship on both sides and keep friends tied with entertaining talks. They are a talented witty person, and their humor attracts people. Do not like being alone; they love to be among people. They should be grateful to those who help them and should not forget their favors.

They can reach the top in fields like scientific research, social activities, and business. Their analytical intelligence and interest in research provide them success in these fields. Want to be involved in every subject, because their curiosity has no limits. Perform every duty with complete dedication. Love to travel; staying far from home is more profitable. Positive change comes in life after 30 years. Marriage is delayed but brings stability. Always a smile on the face, which expresses their internal strength.
7:
The physical structure of a native born in Punarvasu Nakshatra is beautiful, calm, and attractive. A special peace and softness are observed on their face. The eyes are large, calm, and emotional. There is a special softness and grace in their body structure. A special grace and peace are observed in their movement. Their voice is sweet, and their way of talking is very calm and influential. Their presence brings a special feeling of peace and tranquility into the environment.

They are successful in fields related to literature, and their writing ability is very sharp. The time after 31 years is influential; the time before that is troublesome and complicated. Like to save money and improve their level through social activities. Money has importance in their life, but they give more importance to respect and status than money. Although they may seem like an atheist in childhood, devotion awakens with age. Their spiritual consciousness develops over time.

Known as an ideal person in front of common people and people follow them. But people close to them exercise caution in their behavior because they get annoyed and angry unexpectedly. Their state of mind is not easily understood. Always take the lead against injustice and stand on the side of justice. Extremely sensitive to people seeking help and attains spiritual peace by helping them. Deep respect for mother, father, and Guru, which expresses the excellence of their character.

Have a special fear of diseases and are eager to do anything to prevent them. Their awareness of their health is very high. Small environmental changes also affect health, due to which they are alert about the environment change. Astrology advises refraining from partnership business. Do not easily change their thoughts. Married life may not be improved as imagined because the education, economic, and intellectual level of the life partner may not be improved. Relations with some relatives are controversial and painful, but over time, these relationships may improve.

The physical structure of a native born in Pushya Nakshatra is medium, well-built, and healthy. A special peace and gravity are observed on their face. The eyes are calm and deep. There is a special endurance in their body structure. A special slowness and stability are observed in their movement. Their voice is deep, and their way of talking reflects a special knowledge and maturity.

Spending time talking with them is entertaining for others, because their knowledge and wit attract people. They are very sensitive and can easily feel others' pain and suffering. They take the burden of life on their own shoulders, due to which they mature faster than their colleagues. Their maturity is much more than their age. Gain knowledge on various subjects with age, and their scope of knowledge gradually increases.

Taking good decisions and implementing them is a difficult task for them. They take a lot of time to make decisions and analyze all aspects. Even after analysis, cannot take a decision and doubt the success of their decisions. This nature gives a lot of trouble, but they do not fear failure. Their analysis can sometimes defeat experts, because their thinking is very deep. Sharp intelligence becomes brighter due to experience.

Their behavior is very good; they do not want to hurt anyone. Their mind is very soft, and they are always empathetic towards others. Sensitive and empathetic towards others. Always stand on the side of justice and cannot tolerate injustice. Have a unique talent for enjoying various art forms. Life changes after 30 years and a new direction starts in their career. Love to travel; living far from home is more profitable. Need to be careful in choosing friends and associates, because the company of wrong friends can cause them harm. Should take care of health, because they can get sick due to negligence.

The eyes are small but very sharp and piercing. There is a special flexibility and strength in their body structure. A special restlessness and alertness are observed in their movement. They usually have few close friends. Even if everyone is a friend, close ones are few, because they do not trust anyone easily. Intelligence is very sharp and their ability to think is extraordinary. Like to stay quiet and get angry very quickly. Some think they are arrogant, but actually, they are pure-hearted, faithful, and do not hurt others. There is a lot of difference between their external behavior and internal nature.

They can earn from various sources and their path of earning is always variable. There may be changes at the beginning of the business, but once stability comes, they achieve success. Do not get praise according to merit and get less value for skills, which can sometimes frustrate them. Cannot take true advantage of others and cannot praise others either, which leads to success coming late. Because of this nature of theirs, some obstacles are created in their career.

They always try to get things done as they say. If work is not done according to their mind, they get annoyed. Sometimes they get annoyed and angry, but their anger does not last long. Most of the time, they maintain friendship on both sides and keep friends tied with entertaining talks. They are a talented witty person and their humor attracts people. Do not like to be alone; they love to be among people. Should be grateful to those who help them and should not forget their favors.

Scientific research, social activities, and business fields can lead them to the top. Their analytical intelligence and interest in research provide them success in these fields. Want to be involved in every subject, because their curiosity has no limits. Perform every duty with complete dedication. Love to travel; staying far from home is more profitable. Positive change comes in life after 30 years. Marriage is delayed but brings stability. Always a smile on the face, which expresses their internal strength. The physical structure of a native born in Magha Nakshatra is regal, well-built, and influential. A special luster and radiance exist on their face. The eyes are large, bright, and regal. There is a special power and dignity in their body structure. A special regal posture is observed in their movement, which sets them apart from others. Their voice is deep and influential. Their presence leaves a special royal impact on any environment.

They are an entrepreneurial person, and their enthusiasm for work is very strong. Besides respecting elders, they have faith in God. Their religiosity and spirituality are an important part of their life. Being a very spiritual person, they also try to do good in the social field. Dress-up is royal, and people value them. Restrained in wearing clothes, but a special taste is observed in their dress. Arrogance is not absent, but their arrogance does not contain unnecessary pride.

Keep emotional things to themselves and do not express them easily. No one can easily know what is in their heart. Extremely thoughtful about their clan or family and they are always aware of protecting their family's dignity. Enjoy their discipline in life. Interested in various sciences and conversation is sweet. Wise people also respect and recognize them. Have good knowledge of art branches. Have the quality of maintaining their culture, which makes them known as a cultured person.

Do work related to others with good planning, and their plans are always successful. If they hurt someone in their behavior, they try to correct it immediately. Do not like people who hurt others, which creates hidden enemies. Cannot tolerate activities that deviate from the truth. Work for their own mental peace. Not very profitable in the professional field because knowledge about objects is less and there is no business perspective. Go upward through hard work and dedication. Marital life is very good, and their relationship with the life partner is very sweet. The best time of life is between 35 to 55 years.
11:
The physical structure of a native born in Purva Phalguni Nakshatra is beautiful, attractive, and regal. A special brightness and self-confidence are observed on their face. The eyes are large, bright, and influential. There is a special power and beauty in their body structure. A special regal posture and self-confidence are observed in their movement. Their voice is sweet, and their way of talking is very attractive. Their presence influences any environment.

They are a person who loves to be in complete freedom and cannot tolerate any kind of bondage. Can get fame from one or more fields, but there is always some unrest in the mind. Have a sharp intuition to understand others' problems easily. They extend a helping hand even before being asked for help, which shows their sympathy. Conversation is sweet and they love to travel. Travel has a special importance in their life.

Self-absorbed and focus more on themselves. They are very conscious about their appearance, dress, and social status. Have a lot of desire for name and fame in society. Show others that they are a big person, which sometimes makes them known as arrogant. Get angry if there is an obstacle in ভোগ-বিলাসিতা (enjoyment/luxury). Arrogance is a lot; get more arrogant if they get a high position. Small things can hurt them. Are prompt to take revenge for bad behavior, which increases their number of enemies.

Do not want to work under others and they always want to lead. If they do a job, they do not last long, because their independent nature prevents them from working under others. Hesitant in following the advice of seniors. These qualities increase with age. Work in an organized way and the quality of their work is always high. Cannot tolerate the activities of inauspicious organizations or individuals. Many hidden enemies exist, but their strength protects them. Give more importance to status and position than money. Get a good position after 45 years. Marital life is good.

The eyes are calm and deep. There is a special stability and power in their body structure. A special slowness and gravity are observed in their movement. Their voice is deep, and a special knowledge and maturity are reflected in their way of talking.

They like to stay happy and are lucky in terms of receiving respect. There is a special importance of respect and dignity in their life. Behavior is clean and show dedication in work. Very interested in religious activities, and their religious knowledge is very deep. Even when walking, they walk with a sense of pride, which reflects their self-confidence. Both humble and harsh qualities exist; they become harsh only when a decision has to be made.

Listen to others' words but take decisions according to themselves. Their judgment is very sharp, and they are firm in their decisions. Independent-minded. Intelligent and skilled in conversation. Speak clearly, and the meaning of their words can be easily understood. Want to keep the promise they make. Have a lot of creativity and are extremely self-confident. Have selfishness, but their selfishness does not harm others. Collect a good name in social work.

Anger is fierce; difficult to calm down, but their anger does not last long. Do not admit their own mistakes, which sometimes creates problems in relationships. Love to stay independently. Do not hesitate to take responsibility. Do not like to cheat others. Successful as a teacher, writer, researcher. Light of life is missing until 32 years; dynamism increases from 38 years. Property and name established after 50 years. Get good results in fields of mathematics, technology, advertising. Marital life is happy. The eldest child is like a crown.

The physical structure of a native born in Hasta Nakshatra is beautiful, flexible, and crafted. A special cleverness and intellectual feeling are observed on their face. The eyes are sharp and observational. There is a special flexibility and skill in their body structure. Their fingers are long and beautiful, which reflect their skill in craftsmanship. A special sense of order is observed in their movement.

They have skill in all work related to hands — such as playing musical instruments, painting, writing, art, etc. A mixture of mystery and firmness exists in their character. Understand the value of time and do work on time. Their punctuality is a big quality of theirs. Calm and helpful person; help the poor without return. There is no selfishness behind their help.

Do not trust others easily, because their tendency to doubt is high. Facial expressions always remain the same, for which their inner thoughts cannot be understood. There is a magnetic power in the smile that attracts others. Their smile wins people's hearts. Do not like to cheat to get work done. Even after having good qualities, they get criticism and opponents, which sometimes frustrates them. Can run household life well. Receive respect and honor from society.

Intelligent; can change themselves according to the environment they are in. Their adaptation capacity is very sharp. Live with reality. Work with a keen eye and there are no flaws in their work. There are many ups and downs in life. Both good luck and bad luck stay with them. Obstacles come to the high seat even after hard work. Many changes until 30 years; good time from 30 to 42 years. Can earn until 64 years. There is stability in married life.

Their voice is sweet, and their way of talking is very attractive. Their presence makes any environment beautiful.

They are intelligent and peace-loving. Sometimes they become selfish for their own gain, but their selfishness does not harm others much. Have a feeling of kindness towards the poor and gain spiritual peace by helping them. Others' perception is wrong; they think they are uncivil and miserly. But they have hidden qualities of ideas, opinions, and advice which people are later forced to accept.

Possess high-quality intuition. Their foresight and ability to predict the future are very sharp. Get good results in works like teaching, salesman, consultant. Dreams turn into reality, because their imagination power and practical ability are both strong. Find enemies at every step but have the capacity to escape from them. Achieve success through courage and hard work. Difficulty until 32 years; good time from 33 to 54 years.

Their symbol is a shining jewel — related to beauty, form, and craftsmanship. Influenced by the form of objects. Have a lot of creative qualities. Focus on their own appearance. Want to be known in society only through their work. Do good work in art, science, and technology fields. Receive less love from father; get affection from mother or maternal uncle. Might not be able to stay in the birth home, because exile is written in their fate. Even if there are a few problems in married life, they are happy overall.

Ability for quick decisions is low; keep postponing today's work for tomorrow. But the decision they take is very good. Far-sighted; take decisions after thinking thoroughly about the future, which saves them from wrong decisions.

Want the environment around them to be peaceful and balanced. If there is no peace in their environment, they feel unrest. Open-minded person; always have a desire to learn something new. Attraction towards religion, money, and opposite sex is high.

Get many discussions and opposition in life. Do not lose mental balance in danger, which reflects their mental strength. Easily come forward to help people seeking help. Like to work independently. There is a special strength and endurance in their body structure. A special self-confidence and firmness are observed in their movement. Their voice is deep and influential. Their symbol is a decorated gate — which represents the joy of victory after coming out of difficult situations. They never return from their goal. Sometimes they do not even know what the goal is, but once understood, they want to attain it by any means. Achieve the goal through hard work. Their resolve power is very strong, and they get what they want in life.

Always feel the lack of something; do not think about what they have, but the mind goes to what is not there. Due to this nature, they sometimes remain dissatisfied. If Jupiter is good, then interest in knowledge, honesty, and spirituality increases. Do not accept blind faith. Do not like to follow traditional rules. Take ideas that go with time. Can live life away from the family, because their independent nature does not let them stay in bondage.

Believe non-violence and truth to be the supreme religion. Renunciation qualities may come at one time. Have the talent to give speeches. Spend excessively; in some areas stingy, while in unnecessary areas spend more. Do well in business and heavy responsibility jobs. Personality is attractive and intelligent. Mother's position may not be improved. Relationship with father may not be friendly. Hardworking and self-reliant from childhood. Love wife and children very much. Should be careful about health after 55 years.

The physical structure of a native born in Moola Nakshatra is sharp, quick, and strong. A special sharpness and sense of research are observed on their face. The eyes are sharp and truth-seeking. There is a special flexibility and strength in their body structure. A special speed and enthusiasm are observed in their movement. Their voice is clear, and there is a special sharpness in their way of speaking.

They make their own rules to live life and are extremely dedicated to those rules. Leave the work to God, because they believe that God does good to everyone. There is a fear in the mind, which always keeps them alert. Thirst to know about every object — how it happened, why it happened. Very stubborn; keep sticking until they know the origin of the object.

Emotional and self-respecting; have a lot of ego too. Give more importance to their own opinions. Perform duties well. Speak clearly and sometimes get angry. Do not fear to stand against rebellion. Cautious in terms of money. Give advice to others but do not follow in their own case. Suitable as a consultant or religious Guru.

Changes in the workplace; business also keeps changing. More inclination towards money. Expenses exceeding income can lead to debt. Work with dedication in the workplace. Improvement happens if working away from one's own place. Do well in writing or social fields. Do not get much benefit from parents; acquire property themselves. Both good and bad exist in the marital field. New doors of improvement open in the workplace after 32 years.
20:
The physical structure of a native born in Purva Ashadha Nakshatra is well-built, strong, and attractive. A special gravity and self-confidence are observed on their face. The eyes are large and bright. There is a special strength and endurance in their body structure. A special self-confidence and firmness are observed in their movement. Their voice is deep and influential.

Their symbol is a fan — which explains four qualities: returning from difficult situations, showing one's own glamour, keeping the fire burning (stability), and hiding one's own words. Have a feeling of being invincible; think they will not lose to anyone. Brave, fond of travel, philosophical, and optimistic. Do not fear failure, because they know that every failure is a new lesson.

But do not learn from the mistakes made in life; do the same mistake again and again. Because of this nature, their speed of improvement is slow. Anger is high; get angry if someone says something against them. Do not admit their mistakes. Have unrealistic desires or ambitions. Start work without planning. Should understand the limits of their knowledge. Get high positions only with the help of their talent; not from formal education.

No one can defeat them in arguments. Can easily bring others' trust. Give advice but do not take advice from others. Problem in making decisions. Love to work for others but get criticism. More profit from unknown persons. Cannot maintain permanent friendship. Faith in God remains. No improvement until 32 years; good time after that. Do not get benefit from parents but benefit from younger siblings. Stability in married life.
21:
The physical structure of a native born in Uttara Ashadha Nakshatra is beautiful, regal, and influential. A special gravity and leadership feeling are observed on their face. The eyes are calm and deep. There is a special strength and dignity in their body structure. A special regal posture is observed in their movement. Their voice is deep and influential. Their presence brings a feeling of special dignity into the environment.

They have high leadership ability. Involved in duties, royal power, and aggressive work. Civilized, graceful, polite, enthusiastic, and person who respects moral values. Face and appearance look simple and calm, but there is a strong power in their heart. Have the quality of introspection; conscious about their own good and bad qualities.

Can give good advice to others. Easily start any work and finish it. Move with time. Like discipline but sometimes become aggressive and impatient. Good at leadership but no patience for results. Intelligent; return from difficult situations with the help of cleverness and valor. Succeed more when working in a team, because their leadership quality is expressed only among the team.

Due to the influence of Saturn and the Sun, there is also a feeling of laziness. Do not show extravagance if they get a good position. Respect everyone, especially women. Have faith in God. Seem ordinary in transactions. Hate cheating others. Not easily subdued. Do not take decisions without discussion. Success increases after 38 years. Special changes in life occur between 28 to 31 years. There is a mixture of good and bad in married life, but they are happy overall.
22:
The physical structure of a native born in Shravana Nakshatra is beautiful, well-built, and attractive. A special peace and knowledge feeling are observed on their face. The eyes are calm and deep. There is a special stability and strength in their body structure. A special slowness and peace are observed in their movement. Their voice is sweet, and their way of talking is very attractive. Their presence brings a special feeling of knowledge and peace into the environment.

Their conversation is very sweet, and they follow cleanliness in all work. Have made their own code of conduct for living life. Want the surrounding environment to be clean. If they see dirty or undisciplined people, they do not hesitate to speak up. Their outspokenness is a big quality of theirs, but because of this, opponents are also created.

Argumentative and calculative; make decisions after thinking thoroughly. Goals are big. Always move with a positive mindset. Whatever work they take in hand, they leave only after completing it. Life depends on association; good if in good association, bad if in bad association. Mind is of unstable nature. Have a desire to learn by seeing and hearing, which increases the scope of their knowledge.

Good speaker; sound like a wise person while talking. Intelligent; become empathetic seeing others' bad condition. Love to eat good food; have the quality of hospitality. Have faith in God and Guru. Believe that truth always wins. Get betrayal from those helped. Calm from the outside; win people's hearts with cleverness. Changes until 30 years; time of stability from 30 to 45 years. Get good results in technical work. Married field is good.
23:
The physical structure of a native born in Dhanishta Nakshatra is well-built, strong, and attractive. A special enthusiasm and liveliness are observed on their face. The eyes are bright and enthusiastic. There is a special strength and endurance in their body structure. A special speed and rhythm are observed in their movement. Their voice is beautiful, and they have a natural attraction towards music.

They are involved in everything related to speed, music, rhythm, and tone. Do work of time on time; even if there is a bit of laziness in the beginning, once they go to work, it gets fine. Love music. Have a lot of self-confidence and have the quality of good management. Their management ability is very sharp, and they can easily manage large projects.

Not the type to listen to others and work; independent-minded. Choose their own path. Do not like others' possession. Skilled in conversation; articulate. Intelligent. Inspiration to themselves. Work like an expert. Do not hurt anyone easily. Do not take revenge until the right time. Have a special quality of keeping secrets, which makes them known as a trustworthy person.

Ahead of others in arguments; good as a lawyer. Improvement in import field until 24 years. Should be careful before trusting others in business. Manage family properly. Tendency towards siblings is high. Have religious mentality. Mesmerize others with smiles. Personality is social. Money improves only after marriage. Gradual improvement in the workplace after 30 years of age.
24:
The physical structure of a native born in Shatabhisha Nakshatra is tall, lean, and well-structured. A special gravity and mystery are observed on their face. The eyes are large and deep. There is a special endurance and strength in their body structure. A special slowness and gravity are observed in their movement. Their voice is deep, and there is a special mystery in their way of talking.

Their character is like 'truth alone triumphs'. Do not find it difficult to sacrifice themselves for the truth. Live by their own rules. Work selflessly. Follow religious activities. Obstinate; no one can change their decisions. This firmness of theirs helps them in many areas of life, but sometimes creates problems too.

Intelligent and skilled in various fields of life. Soft-hearted. Mysterious person; do not reveal everything. Hide their thoughts, desires, knowledge. Have a thirst to know about truth and mystery. High tendency to doubt. Like to live alone and introverted; resulting in increased knowledge. Move towards spirituality, because their mind is always searching for the deep meaning of life.

Mixed results under the influence of Rahu. Get angry quickly and calm down quickly. Feel shy to show their merit. Common in the workplace until 32 years; need more hard work for success. Not much improvement from relatives. Gain more from mother than father. There may be one or two problems in marriage, but can be happy through mutual understanding. Stability comes in the workplace after 35 years of age.
25:
The physical structure of a native born in Purva Bhadrapada Nakshatra is beautiful, well-built, and attractive. A special mystery and depth are observed on their face. The eyes are large and emotional. There is a special strength and endurance in their body structure. A special slowness and gravity are observed in their movement. Their voice is deep, and a special influence is reflected in their way of talking.

Have a special quality like having two different faces — which explains their two natures. People do not easily recognize what they are actually like. What they show in society is different from the person they are at home. Like peace and silence, but sometimes become aggressive. This dual nature makes them mysterious.

Sensitive and also have a lot of physical strength. If the direction of energy is not found, there can be problems. If there is a benefic planet with the Moon, they become a saintly nature; if a malefic planet exists, they may get involved in inauspicious work. Many changes come in life. Inner strength is a lot; whatever they want to do, they do it. Hardworking; respect people who deserve respect.

Feel bad for mistakes and try to correct them. Suffer mental agony over small things. Interested in good food. Dress-up is not special. Opinions are neutral. Interested in gaining respect and honor more than rich. Have devotion to God but do not believe in blind faith. Important time between 24 to 33 years; auspicious time from 40 to 54 years. Not much profit from mother. There is stability in married life.
26:
The physical structure of a native born in Uttara Bhadrapada Nakshatra is beautiful, well-built, and attractive. A special gravity and thoughtfulness are observed on their face. The eyes are large and deep. There is a special strength and endurance in their body structure. A special slowness and gravity are observed in their movement. Their voice is deep, and a special knowledge is identified in their way of talking.

Their personality is like twins — whose faces are the same. No one knows their nature well. Do not reveal their goals before others. Intelligent and patient. Do not leave goals easily and do not rest until they get what they want. Their patience and resolve power are extremely strong.

Have the quality of adaptability; can fit in anywhere. Brain develops over time. Far-sighted; think about the future consequences of work. Argumentative and calculative. Want to know the mystery of life's existence, spirituality. Calm nature; shy but stubborn. Do not work without thinking, because there is deep thought behind their every work.

Lucky in terms of money; good in both earning and saving. Have kindness towards others; become good consultants. See everyone in society with equal vision. Person of clean heart. Anger rises quickly but does not last. Do anything for people they like. Can suppress enemies. Work may not be done on time due to laziness. Improvement in various areas of life happens only after marriage. Business changes at 19, 21, 28, 30, 35, 42 years. Not much profit from father; father's perspective changes after 32 years. Married life is happy. Eldest child is like a crown.
27:
The physical structure of a native born in Revati Nakshatra is soft, beautiful, and attractive. A special peace and softness are observed on their face. The eyes are large, dreamy, and emotional. There is a special softness and grace in their body structure. A special sweetness and slowness are observed in their movement. Their voice is sweet, and their way of talking is very attractive. Their presence brings a special feeling of peace and tranquility into the environment.

They have the quality of being sociable and happy. Extremely lucky; even if they have to work hard for profit, they get it with less effort than others. Have a lot of optimism; no matter how serious the situation, they do not get discouraged. Have a lot of faith in God. Self-confident and have their own rules. Faith in God in their life helps them move forward.

But if they move forward only with the help of faith and do not perform action, failure may come. Improvement happens if they perform action along with faith. If Saturn aspects the Moon, they become a person who lives with reality. Always remain in some imagination; think imagination as truth. Should stay a bit away from imagination, because connecting with reality is important for them.

Civilized person; like a healthy environment. Usually born into a civilized family. Social and sociable. Heart is soft; get hurt quickly by bad words. Have the quality of articulate speech; have the art of giving speeches. Have good knowledge about words. Intelligent; have the quality of recognizing people. Can trade by adjusting with time. Like to live independently but get hurt if there is an obstacle in work. Cannot keep any matter secret for a long time. Do not trust blindly, but if a trustworthy person is found, it is difficult to remove that person. Hot-tempered; do work according to their heart. Better to ask at least three people before doing big work. Ambitious and stubborn. Interested in science, mythology, astrology, etc. Can be involved in poet, writer, health management. Improvement is more if staying away from the birthplace. Acquire wealth with their own capability. Not much profit from father. Marital field is good. Gradual improvement in the workplace after 30 years of age.
